Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "WIZARDPLUS-0810" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Wizard Plus.prg"
Metadata.Notes: To remove the high score loading and saving to disk, NOP'd out the JSR call to the kernal save routine ($F5ED) at $242A and replaced the JMP to the kernal load routine ($F4A5) at $2451 with an RTS.
